title: Samsung India Electronics Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Samsung India Electronics Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics Capital India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics Capital India:
Samsung India Electronics Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics Capital India!
